reviews.observed_end_state: Product is stable beside laptop and keyboard, but the final frame has faint fake UI text on the product.
reviews.root_cause: Text prohibition was not strong enough for the model.
reviews.first_repair_variable: Add explicit no readable brand text, subtitles, UI labels, or fake screen text.

reviews.observed_end_state: Mist appears from the wrong side of the product.
reviews.root_cause: Output location was not locked to the correct product component.
reviews.first_repair_variable: Bind mist to the visible outlet and reduce intensity.
